scripts.service:up: npm run infra:local && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml up -d database
scripts.service:down: npm run infra:local && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml down
scripts.migrate:up: npm run banco:dados && npm run service:up && npm run service:wait && node --env-file=.env.development node_modules/node-pg-migrate/bin/node-pg-migrate up
scripts.test:watch: npm run testes && npm run migrate:up && node --experimental-vm-modules --env-file=.env.development node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --watchAll
scripts.test:ci: npm run testes && npm run migrate:up && node --experimental-vm-modules --env-file=.env.development node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js
scripts.dev: npm run banco:dados && npm run migrate:up && node --env-file=.env.development --watch src/server.js
scripts.start: npm run producao && npm run migrate:up && node src/server.js
scripts.teste:docker: echo ======== TESTE DA IMAGEM DOCKER COMPLETA ========
scripts.docker:up: npm run teste:docker && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml up -d --build && npm run migrate:up && echo container rodando!, acesse http://localhost:3333
scripts.docker:down: npm run teste:docker && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml down
